title: Husky's Chaotic Neutral Modpack
description: This a custom modpack made by HuskyInABasket that adds some vanilla adjacent mechanics and features to minecraft. It contains a lot of game mechanic changes and mostly to changes to the structures and terrain generation.
body:
### General Info:
I created this modpack in mind to have a vanilla adjacent gameplay. With that in mind there is a lot of little  and big changes to the game. A lot of structures are added and the terrain (in my opinion) is vastly improved. A lot of optimization mods are also added to improve stability server and client side. Most notably Sodium and starlight.

ALL RIGHTS RESERVED AND TO THEIR RESPECTIVE OWNERS.
You may use this modpack in content creation as long as you give credit
